children.text: a manufacturer of cigarette papers and tubes, or

children.heading: Reduced rates for small proprietors
children.label: b Reduced rates for small proprietors

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Subsection (a) shall be applied by substituting “$500” for “$1,000” with respect to any taxpayer the gross receipts of which (for the most recent taxable year ending before the 1st day of the taxable period to which the tax imposed by subsection (a) relates) are less than $500,000.

children.heading: Controlled group rules
children.label: 2 Controlled group rules
children.text: All persons treated as 1 taxpayer under section 5061(e)(3) shall be treated as 1 taxpayer for purposes of paragraph (1).

children.heading: Certain rules to apply
children.label: 3 Certain rules to apply
children.text: For purposes of paragraph (1), rules similar to the rules of subparagraphs (B) and (C) of section 448(c)(3) shall apply.

children.heading: Penalty for failure to register
children.label: c Penalty for failure to register
children.text: Any person engaged in a business referred to in subsection (a) who willfully fails to pay the tax imposed by subsection (a) shall be fined not more than $5,000, or imprisoned not more than 2 years, or both, for each such offense.
